overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a high-speed drive through an industrial district transitioning into a dense futuristic metropolis. The player navigates a sports car with a red-trimmed interior through multi-lane roads, under overpasses, and along elevated highways while the environment shifts from warehouses and power lines to towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district intersection with power infrastructure

events.description: vehicle stops at red traffic light then accelerates as light changes
turns onto highway entrance ramp leaving industrial warehouse district

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial streets, stopping at intersection, then accelerating onto highway ramp

notable_agents.action: dark van driving ahead in same direction, maintaining distance

entered.detail: large traffic signal with red light illuminated at industrial crossroads
tall metal lattice electricity pylons with multiple high-tension lines
large corrugated metal building with loading docks and graffiti
elevated highway bridge casting shadows on the road below
concrete barrier with colorful spray paint art including blue and orange designs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at an industrial intersection with traffic lights and power lines dominating the skyline. The driver waits at a red light surrounded by warehouses and industrial buildings, then accelerates through the intersection and onto a highway entrance ramp. The environment features exposed asphalt roads, sparse vegetation, and graffiti-covered walls as the vehicle transitions from street driving to highway speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with overpasses and storage facilities

events.description: vehicle accelerates to highway speed while merging into faster traffic
distant futuristic city skyline becomes visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: merging onto multi-lane highway and accelerating past industrial silos and storage tanks

entered.detail: large concrete and steel bridge structure spanning across the highway
tall cylindrical storage tanks with rusted metal exteriors
futuristic skyscrapers and towers visible on the horizon indicating urban approach
commercial advertisement structure with visible branding

segments.scene_description: The vehicle merges onto a multi-lane highway surrounded by industrial infrastructure including silos, storage facilities, and overhead power lines. The camera passes under several concrete overpasses while the distant futuristic city skyline first appears on the horizon. The road is flanked by guardrails and occasional billboards as the environment transitions from dense industrial buildings to more open highway terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approaching dense urban center with holographic advertisements

events.description: road elevates onto raised highway with skyscrapers becoming prominent
vehicle overtakes slower traffic while navigating elevated curves

agents.ego_description: speeding along elevated highway curves, overtaking vehicles while approaching the city center

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead, occasionally braking

entered.detail: large digital advertisement display with blue and white graphics mounted on building
group of tall futuristic buildings with glass and steel facades
elevated roadway structure passing overhead creating partial cover
high-rise commercial buildings with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The highway elevates above ground level, offering views of the approaching metropolis with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards. The vehicle navigates curved elevated sections with guardrails, passing under and over other highway structures. The industrial landscape gives way to modern office towers and dense urban architecture as the city center grows larger in the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with multi-level highway interchange and heavy traffic

events.description: yellow taxi overtakes on the right side at high speed
entering the dense city center with towering skyscrapers on both sides

agents.ego_description: weaving through dense traffic in the urban canyon, surrounded by skyscrapers and other vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi aggressively overtaking on the right shoulder

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers lining both sides of the highway creating an urban canyon effect
complex highway junction with multiple levels of roads and ramps
illuminated commercial signs and advertisements on building facades
tall residential towers with numerous windows and balconies

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the dense urban core where skyscrapers tower on both sides creating a canyon-like environment. The highway becomes a multi-level interchange with heavy traffic including a yellow taxi that overtakes aggressively. Neon signage and holographic advertisements illuminate the scene as the vehicle navigates through the heart of the futuristic metropolis, surrounded by high-rise apartments and commercial towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stagnant industrial intersection into a high-speed merge toward a distant futuristic metropolis. It begins at a red light surrounded by warehouses, power lines, and graffiti-covered walls before accelerating through the intersection and onto a highway entrance ramp. As the vehicle gains speed, the scene shifts from street-level asphalt and sparse vegetation to a multi-lane highway flanked by industrial silos and storage facilities. The camera then passes under a series of concrete overpasses, with the environment opening up to reveal the towering city skyline appearing on the horizon. Finally, the road stretches forward past guardrails and billboards as the dense industrial infrastructure gradually gives way to the open approach of the city.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive as an elevated highway transitions from the outskirts of an industrial zone into the dense, neon-lit heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with the road ascending above ground level, where the horizon opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards emerging from the distance. As the vehicle navigates curved sections and passes under concrete overpasses, the surrounding industrial landscape gradually gives way to modern office towers and dense urban architecture. The scene then shifts into a canyon-like urban core where skyscrapers loom on both sides and the highway transforms into a complex multi-level interchange. Finally, the camera weaves through heavy traffic, passing an aggressive yellow taxi amidst a blur of neon signage and high-rise apartments in the center of the city.
